community_graphrag_search.name: community_graphrag_search
community_graphrag_search.description: Traverse community summaries from high-level clusters down to finer clusters, then pull supporting text evidence. Use for theme-level synthesis, broad topic exploration, or cross-event aggregation. It is not the best default tool for direct multiple-choice evidence lookup.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Natural-language question or theme to search for.

parameters.name: community_top_k
parameters.description: How many communities to keep at each level. Default 3.

parameters.name: start_level
parameters.description: Optional starting community level. If omitted, starts from the highest level.

parameters.name: max_depth
parameters.description: Maximum number of community levels to drill down. Default 2.

parameters.name: child_limit_per_parent
parameters.description: Maximum number of child communities to expand per parent. Default 8.

parameters.name: use_llm_filter
parameters.description: Whether to apply LLM relevance filtering to candidate communities.

parameters.name: llm_filter_threshold
parameters.description: LLM relevance threshold. Default 0.35.

parameters.name: document_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of evidence document_ids to extract. Default 6.

parameters.name: max_evidence_length
parameters.description: Maximum extracted evidence length per document. Default 240.

parameters.name: member_preview_limit
parameters.description: How many representative community members to preview. Default 5.

narrative_hierarchical_search.name: narrative_hierarchical_search
narrative_hierarchical_search.description: Retrieve evidence through the narrative hierarchy Storyline -> Episode -> Event -> source documents. Useful for plot progression, event connections, and cross-section narrative questions.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Narrative question or query.

parameters.name: storyline_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of storyline candidates. Default 4.

parameters.name: episode_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of episode candidates. Default 5.

parameters.name: event_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of event candidates. Default 8.

parameters.name: document_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of source documents. Default 6.

parameters.name: llm_filter_threshold
parameters.description: Relevance threshold for hierarchical filtering. Default 0.35.

parameters.name: max_evidence_length
parameters.description: Maximum evidence length per document. Default 240.

section_evidence_search.name: section_evidence_search
section_evidence_search.description: Section-level evidence retrieval that finds relevant scenes or sections and extracts answer-bearing text. Useful for local facts, scene localization, dialogue, actions, objects, and grounding.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Question or query to ground in sections.

parameters.name: section_top_k
parameters.description: Maximum number of relevant sections. Default 8.

parameters.name: use_llm_filter
parameters.description: Whether to apply LLM filtering to section candidates.

parameters.name: llm_filter_top_k
parameters.description: How many section candidates to send to the LLM filter. Default 12.

parameters.name: llm_filter_threshold
parameters.description: LLM relevance threshold. Default 0.35.

parameters.name: max_length
parameters.description: Maximum evidence length per matched section. Default 320.

parameters.name: related_entity_limit
parameters.description: Maximum related entities to show per type. Default 3.
